robloxapi-error-no-arguments: Error message shown when no arguments are provided to the #robloxAPI parser function
robloxapi-error-invalid-data: Error message shown when the API returns invalid data
robloxapi-error-decode-failure: Error message shown when the API response cannot be decoded
robloxapi-error-datasource-not-found: Error message shown when a data source is not found. $1 is the ID of the missing data source
robloxapi-error-datasource-disabled: Error message shown when a data source is found but disabled. $1 is the ID of the data source
robloxapi-error-unexpected-data-structur: Error message shown when the API returns an unexpected data structure
robloxapi-error-datasource-returned-no-d: Error message shown when a data source returns no data
robloxapi-error-user-group-not-found: Error message shown when the group data for a user cannot be found
robloxapi-error-request-failed: Error message shown when a request to the API fails
robloxapi-error-request-rate-limited: Error message shown when a request to the API fails due to rate limits. $1 is the data source ID
robloxapi-error-request-cancelled-rate-l: Error message shown when a request to the API is cancelled because prior requests to the same data source resulted in rate limits. $1 is the data source ID
robloxapi-error-arg-not-allowed: Error message shown when an argument is not allowed for a specific type. $1 is the invalid argument and $2 is the type
robloxapi-error-missing-argument: Error message shown when a required argument is missing. $1 is the type of argument that is missing
robloxapi-error-missing-optional-argumen: Error message shown when an optional argument is missing a value. The optional argument must be in the format 'key=value'
robloxapi-error-unknown-optional-argumen: Error message shown when an unknown optional argument is provided. $1 is the unknown argument's key
robloxapi-error-too-many-required-args: Error message shown when too many required arguments are provided to a data source. $1 is the argument that exceeds the maximum number of required arguments
robloxapi-error-usage-limit: Error message shown when trying to exceed a data source usage limit. $1 is the data source id, $2 the amount of times it can be used per page.
robloxapi-error-usage-limit-dependent: Error message shown when trying to exceed a data source usage limit through a dependent data source. $1 is the id of the fetcher data source, $2 the amount of times it can be used per page, $3 is the id of the dependent data source.
robloxapi-category-deprecated-parser-fun:
{{Tracking category name}}
Name of the tracking category for pages that use a deprecated parser function from the RobloxAPI extension.
Description of the tracking category for deprecated parser function usage.
robloxapi-category-error:
{{Tracking category name}}
Name of the tracking category for pages where using the {{#robloxAPI}} parser function results in an error.
robloxapi-category-error-desc: Description of the RobloxAPI error tracking category.
robloxapi-arg-type-boolean: Label for the boolean argument type
robloxapi-arg-type-sort-order: Label for the sort order argument type
robloxapi-arg-type-thumbnail-format: Label for the thumbnail format argument type
robloxapi-arg-type-thumbnail-size: Label for the thumbnail size argument type
robloxapi-arg-type-username: Label for the username argument type
robloxapi-arg-type-asset-id: Label for the asset ID argument type
robloxapi-arg-type-badge-id: Label for the badge ID argument type
robloxapi-arg-type-group-id: Label for the group ID argument type
robloxapi-arg-type-place-id: Label for the place ID argument type
robloxapi-arg-type-role-id: Label for the role ID argument type
robloxapi-arg-type-universe-id: Label for the universe ID argument type
robloxapi-arg-type-user-id: Label for the user ID argument type
robloxapi-arg-type-limit: Label for the limit argument type
robloxapi-arg-type-return-policy: Label for the return policy argument type
robloxapi-arg-type-json-key: Label for the JSON key argument type
robloxapi-error-invalid-choice-argument: Error message shown when an invalid choice is provided for an argument. $1 is the invalid choice, $2 is a comma-separated list of possible values, and $3 is the argument type.
robloxapi-error-invalid-generic-argument: Error message shown when an invalid value is provided for an argument. $1 is the invalid value, and $2 is the argument type.
robloxapi-error-passed-error-value: Error message shown when an argument contains an error value. $1 is the argument type, and $2 is the error message.
